runs.note: Fixed the MFA enrollment endpoint in sessions.js to properly await the MFA secret generation and invalidate other active sessions for the user when MFA is enabled or disabled, or the password is changed. Also implemented the getActiveSessions and terminateSession functions to meet the ASVS compliance requirements.
